title: Smoky Dutch Citrus Peel Crumble
description: A delightful monsoon dutch dish featuring citrusy flavors, flaky texture, and a hint of smokiness in this plant-based-friendly recipe.
instructions: Combine Single Cream, Water or Vegetable Stock, Smoked Paprika, and Caster Sugar in a saucepan. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
Add Milk and continue stirring until mixture is smooth and hot but not boiling.
Squeeze 6 slices of citrus peel into the liquid to release oils and add more flavor.
Transfer the mixture to a shallow baking dish and sprinkle Almond Flour evenly on top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, stirring every 10 minutes to prevent burning.
